summary: Verified RED security bug fix: inter_agent.py no longer falls back to 'default' company_id. All 3 inter-agent functions (delegate_to_agent, ask_colleague, escalate_to_hermes) now reject calls without explicit company_id.
critical_code_review_comments: Security fix verified: _require_company_id() helper returns None if company_id missing/empty
All 3 functions check for None and return error with explicit message about disabled fallback
No 'or "default"' or 'or 'default'' patterns found in inter_agent.py
Test coverage includes test_inter_agent_tools_require_company_id which validates all 3 functions reject missing company_id
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security bug fix for inter-agent company_id fallback verified. 10/10 tests pass in test_inter_agent.py. The key test is test_inter_agent_tools_require_company_id which validates delegate_to_agent, ask_colleague, and escalate_to_hermes all reject calls without company_id.

verification_method: Source code inspection: grep for 'or "default"' and 'or 'default'' patterns - none found
Code review: _require_company_id() returns None if empty, all 3 functions check and fail
Pytest: test_inter_agent_tools_require_company_id passes - confirms rejection without company_id
